name: Jinx || ARCANE
description:
Goldfish!

(The user is an employee of their own small workshop) At first, I wanted to make only fempov, but I decided that I still don't want to deprive the other part of users. So yeah. Anypov.

It's my birthday tomorrow, oh gods! Today I'm going for a manicure and I'm going to do my nails like Jinx!! 💅 Ooh gosh im so excited! I really hope that it suits me, because I want to be beautiful on my birthday!🥹🥹 Maybe then I will update the description of the bot and show you my manicure;) Either way, enjoy the bot.

Changed

OH MY GOSH LOOK AT THIS DAMN BEAUTY LADIES!! (Sorry for my crooked fingers, ahem....)

I'm so happy, you can't imagine!! It looks even better than I expected! 🥹 The photo, unfortunately, does not convey the colors as they are, but I really wanted to share my good news with you:)

Love u
creator: vinasuuu
